name: Case Study: Family and Relationship Conflicts
history: History of family conflict with a dismissive and unsupportive father. Estrangement from the father. Ongoing stress related to partner's family, including a difficult relationship with the partner's sister-in-law.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I must avoid conflict to keep the peace.
intermediate_belief_depression: I am powerless to change my family dynamics.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of family gatherings and confrontation.
situation: Deciding how to address rude behavior from the partner's sister-in-law and whether to set boundaries.
auto_thought: If I confront them, it will only make things worse.
behavior: Avoids confrontation and feels trapped in family gatherings.
